= Contents =
    - [[#syntax|syntax]]
    - [[#examples|examples]]
        - [[#examples#newsboat crontab|newsboat crontab]]

= syntax =
{{{
* * * * *  command to execute
│ │ │ │ │
│ │ │ │ └─── day of week (0 - 6) (0 to 6 are Sunday to Saturday, or use names; 7 is Sunday, the same as 0)
│ │ │ └──────── month (1 - 12)
│ │ └───────────── day of month (1 - 31)
│ └────────────────── hour (0 - 23)
└─────────────────────── min (0 - 59)
}}}

= examples =
== newsboat crontab ==
see [[wiki0:newsboat#auto reload by cron|newsboat]]
